heroImageAlt: People receiving care in the Dove Cottage day hospice
heroShortDescription: Services tailored to your individual needs.
mainIntro1: We offer each person the chance to attend one day a week, on the same weekday each time — steady, familiar support in a friendly, home-from-home setting.
mainIntro2: If you do not want to attend for a full day, we offer the flexibility of a regular morning or afternoon or to access all of our care and support on an ad-hoc basis.
mainIntro3: Click on the links below to discover more about our individual services that take place within our hospice building.

buildingCards.title: Nursing Care & Medical Advice
buildingCards.excerpt: Expert nursing support and symptom management in a social home-from-home environment.
buildingCards.imageAlt: Nursing and medical care in a day hospice setting

buildingCards.title: Wellbeing Activities
buildingCards.excerpt: Group sessions, creativity, and gentle activities that bring people together.
buildingCards.imageAlt: People taking part in a group activity in the hospice

buildingCards.title: Counselling
buildingCards.excerpt: Confidential one-to-one sessions with qualified counsellors for patients, family members, and unpaid carers.
buildingCards.imageAlt: A quiet, private conversation in a safe environment

buildingCards.title: Bereavement Support
buildingCards.excerpt: A listening ear, groups, and signposting for anyone affected by loss or preparing for a bereavement.
buildingCards.imageAlt: Countryside and sky after a storm, symbolising hope and reflection

buildingCards.title: Complementary Therapies
buildingCards.excerpt: Holistic support such as touch therapies and relaxation techniques to help with comfort and stress.

buildingCards.title: Therapy Bathing
buildingCards.excerpt: A dignified, soothing bathing service when everyday washing has become difficult at home.

buildingCards.title: Spiritual & Chaplaincy Support
buildingCards.excerpt: Space to talk about hope, meaning, and what matters to you, whatever your beliefs or background.

buildingCards.title: Transport
buildingCards.excerpt: Support getting to the hospice and related appointments where our volunteer drivers and vehicles can help.
buildingCards.imageAlt: A volunteer-driven accessible vehicle in the countryside

additionalIntro: In addition to our core hospice-based services, we also offer support as follows:

additionalCards.title: Patient & Carer Wellbeing Sessions
additionalCards.excerpt: Holistic support for individuals and carers: relaxed Monday sessions to connect and access nursing and carer support.
additionalCards.imageAlt: A calm, supportive place to talk and learn together

additionalCards.title: Counselling & Support
additionalCards.excerpt: Counselling, support groups, and more — browse everything in this area of our work.
additionalCards.imageAlt: Support and counselling in the community

additionalCards.title: Dementia Home-Sitting
additionalCards.excerpt: Trained volunteers keep people company at home so carers can take a much-needed break with peace of mind.
additionalCards.imageAlt: A friendly volunteer visiting someone at home

referralIntro: Access to all of our services is via our referral process which can be initiated by either the patient themselves, a carer or a healthcare professional.
referralOutro: and a member of our team will be in touch with more information.
